root:errors=0
root:warnings=0
root:options_present=false
root:instance_present=true
root:module_present=false
root:css_present=false
root:fragment_len=4
root/options:none
root/instance:context=default
root/instance:attrs=["lang"]
root/module:none
root/css:none
root/fragment:len=4
root/fragment/0:type=Text
root/fragment/0:span=27..29
root/fragment/0:raw="\n\n"
root/fragment/1:type=SnippetBlock
root/fragment/1:span=29..81
root/fragment/1:name="foo"
root/fragment/1/body:len=3
root/fragment/1/body/0:type=Text
root/fragment/1/body/0:span=56..58
root/fragment/1/body/0:raw="\n\t"
root/fragment/1/body/1:type=RegularElement
root/fragment/1/body/1:span=58..70
root/fragment/1/body/1:name="p"
root/fragment/1/body/1:attrs=[]
root/fragment/1/body/1/fragment:len=1
root/fragment/1/body/1/fragment/0:type=ExpressionTag
root/fragment/1/body/1/fragment/0:span=61..66
root/fragment/1/body/1/fragment/0:expr="msg"
root/fragment/1/body/2:type=Text
root/fragment/1/body/2:span=70..71
root/fragment/1/body/2:raw="\n"
root/fragment/2:type=Text
root/fragment/2:span=81..83
root/fragment/2:raw="\n\n"
root/fragment/3:type=RenderTag
root/fragment/3:span=83..101
root/fragment/3:expr="foo(msg)"
